response.justification: Strong foundational fit with 15+ years of full-stack development and current AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. While the resume lacks explicit mentions of Vitest, Jest, Playwright, and PostgreSQL, the candidate demonstrates deep testing expertise, strong TypeScript/Node.js proficiency, and a track record of quickly mastering new technologies. The alignment with AI agent development requirements is a significant plus.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching required AI agent development expertise
15+ years of full-stack development with proven Senior/Staff-level ability to design and deliver end-to-end features across web, mobile, and backend systems
Deep testing craftsmanship demonstrated through creating fluent-asserts and trial testing frameworks plus consistent TDD practice
concerns: Resume doesn't explicitly mention Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite these being required testing framework skills
No PostgreSQL experience listed; only MongoDB and generic SQL mentioned, limiting database technology breadth vs job requirements
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS; no evidence of GCP or Azure experience despite these being listed as required options
